docs.text:
Salesforce: The #1 AI CRM | Salesforce IN
Skip to content
Get Started with Salesforce
 - India's #1 Agentic CRM
Automate better sales, service, and marketing with humans and AI agents working together on one trusted, agentic CRM platform. See value from day one with quick and easy setup and pre-built agents.
    Start for free
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
        
    Watch demo
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
 
Where humans, agents, and platforms drive customer success together.
    
        Welcome to the Agentic Enterprise
    
Humans and 
agents
 work inside the systems that run your business. The result: faster decisions, stronger customer relationships, and non-stop growth. Now with Headless 360, every Salesforce capability is accessible from any tool, any agent, any interface — wherever work happens.
    Slack
    
Connect workflows and conversational data where work happens.
    Learn more
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    Tableau
    
Turn agentic analytics into actionable intelligence.
    Learn more
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    Agentforce
    
Build trusted, agentic experiences that act with purpose.
    Learn more
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    Customer 360
    
Ground every decision in proven business context.
    Learn more
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    Data 360
    
One governed, trusted data foundation.
    Learn more
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    Explore Agentforce Coworker
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    Meet Slackbot
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    
        See why companies trust us to help them grow
    
    
        Built-in AI for every part of your business
Put AI to work across sales, service, and marketing with 
Starter Suite
 — a CRM that knows your business and can automate the kind of customer experiences you’ll actually be proud of. Start simply with quick and easy setup and prebuilt agents.
    Start for free
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
        
    Start demo
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
        
    
        3M+ conversations handled by Agentforce and counting
    
Everyone talks the AI talk. We’re walking the walk. With 66% autonomous case resolution, 15% more marketing pipeline, and 1.8x higher lead conversion, Agentforce delivers real conversational Al across service, sales, and marketing workflows. See how we did it – and how you can, too.
    See our stories
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    Experience Salesforce Help
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
Group CIO, Ambuja Neotia Group
    
        Kripadyuti Sarkar
    
Salesforce gave us the agility and ease of use to quickly build the transparent and service-oriented journeys that define our customer philosophy. This is key to serving our real estate customers with the empathy they deserve.
    See the Ambuja Neotia story
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
Chief Digital & Technology Officer, Pandora
    
        David Walmsley
    
    See the Pandora story
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
SVP, Technology, Williams Sonoma
    
         Sameer Hassan
    
    See the Williams Sonoma story
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
EVP, Strategy & New Business Ventures, Pacers Sports & Entertainment
    
        Joey Graziano
    
    See the Pacers story
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
Director of Program Development, Disaster Response & Recovery, Good360
    
        Peyton Kliewer
    
    See the Good360 story
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
Head of Value Center Sales, Siemens, Smart Infrastructure, Siemens
    
        Madalina Lazar Vopel
    
    See the Siemens story
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
CIO, SharkNinja
    
        Velia Carboni
    
    See the SharkNinja story
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
CTO, Pearson
    
        David Treat
    
    See the Pearson story
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    
        Salesforce is the platform
for the Agentic Enterprise
    
Our deeply unified platform brings together apps, data, agents, and metadata to drive customer and employee success. With trust and governance built in, Salesforce ensures your AI and business scale securely, reliably, and with confidence.
    See all products
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    
        Launch faster with 16+ Agentforce solutions, built for your industry
    
Designed with industry expertise, these out-of-the-box solutions align with your workflows, data, and customer needs, so you can modernise faster, go to market sooner, and deliver value from day one.
    Financial Services
    
Connect with customers proactively to deliver AI-powered, high-value experiences.
    Explore Financial Services
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    Retail
    
Acquire profitable customers faster with unified, real-time data.
    Explore Retail
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    Consumer Goods
    
Transform your business with consumer goods technology made for your industry.
    Explore Consumer Goods
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    Manufacturing
    
Integrate all your data across a unified value chain to better serve customers and channel partners.
    Explore Manufacturing
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    Automotive
    
Drive personalised experiences, explore new revenue models and power software-defined vehicles.
    Explore Automotive
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    Healthcare & Life Sciences
    
Elevate your workforce with AI agents for healthier businesses, outcomes, and communities.
    Explore Healthcare & Life Sciences
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    Education
    
Elevate the education experience with the #1 AI CRM for learner and institution success.
    Explore Education
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    Media
    
Enhance your digital media solution that has advanced sales intelligence and automation, driving higher seller productivity.
    Explore Media
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    See all Industries
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
    
    
        Trusted CRM Software by 150,000+ Businesses Worldwide
    
    See all stories
    
    
    
    
        
            
        
    
    
        
    
        See why analysts agree Salesforce should be your Agentic AI partner

        Become an Agentblazer
    
Learn essential AI and Agentforce skills required to shape the future of work for free.
    Explore all Agentforce learning

composio_raw.name: Salesforce
composio_raw.description: Salesforce is a leading CRM platform integrating sales, service, marketing, and analytics to build customer relationships and drive business growth

llm_raw.description: Salesforce is a comprehensive cloud-based customer relationship management (CRM) platform providing sales, customer service, marketing automation, and analytics tools.
llm_raw.notes: Relying on prior knowledge of Salesforce's extensive Developer Experience (DX), REST/GraphQL APIs, and OAuth2 authorization flows, as well as the 184 tools already integrated via Composio.
